role: Indie Game Developer & Freelance Software Engineer
description: Designed, developed, and published interactive software and games, managing the full lifecycle from concept to deployment. Collaborated with freelance artists and designers to integrate assets into custom pipelines.
highlights: Engineered a custom 2D physics controller in C# for a platformer, resolving edge-case collision bugs present in out-of-the-box solutions.
Optimized rendering loops in MonoGame, achieving a consistent 60 FPS on low-end hardware by implementing spatial partitioning (QuadTrees).
Developed a RESTful leaderboard API using Node.js and Express, hosted on a self-managed Linux VPS via Nginx.
